attributes.action: Capitalise on more North Sea Oil and Gas licensing to boost our economic growth.
attributes.additional_details: We need to build up sufficient supplies and reserves of oil and gas. We should not be too dependent on our energy needs being resourced from other countries such as LPG from far off places. Our military strength has been depleted over the years.  Increased national wealth from the North Sea should ideally enable greater investment in our armed forces as well as NHS and other worthy causes. Also greater investment could be made  in energy saving developments using tax income.
attributes.background: Promote more North Sea exploration to reduce  energy supply reliance on other countries. Reduce red tape and demonstrate leadership at this time of need.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
